title: [FIRRTL] Compiled failed using Clang on Apple Mac M2 platform
body:
### Platform infos

clang/Clang++ : Apple clang version 14.0.3 (clang-1403.0.22.14.1)
cmake: cmake version 3.27.9
ninja: 1.11.1
circt branch: main(latest)
llvm branch: main(latest)

When compile circt, will report these errors:
